United States.title: Supreme Court Strikes Down Roe v. Wade
United States.summary: On June 24, 2022, the US Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a landmark decision that protected a woman's right to abortion. The ruling has sparked protests and raised concerns about reproductive rights in the US.

United States.title: Heatwave and Drought in Western US
United States.summary: A severe heatwave and drought have affected the western United States, leading to power outages, wildfires, and concerns about food security and water scarcity.

United States.title: US-North Korea Tensions Rise
United States.summary: Tensions between the US and North Korea have increased following a series of missile tests by Pyongyang, which has raised concerns about nuclear proliferation and regional stability.

South Korea.source: N Korean leader's sister reappears amid speculation about Kim's health and power struggle.  Her reappearance has added fuel to speculation about the health of her brother, Kim Jong Un, and the balance of power in their inner circle.
US diplomat visits South Korea amid tension with North Korea.  The unannounced visit was intended to reassure Seoul about Washington’s commitment to security in the region.

South Korea.summary: North Korea resumes missile tests, US says.  The US military confirmed the launch, but North Korea has yet to comment on its intent for the test.

Japan.title: Protest erupts outside Japan's defense ministry over F-35 fighter jet controversy
Japan.summary: A protest took place outside Japan's defense ministry on June 27, 2024, over the controversy surrounding the F-35 fighter jet purchase. The incident highlighted tensions between the Japanese government and the public over the military's spending priorities.

Japan.title: Japan's government warned of 'grave consequences' if US does not provide adequate support for its military
Japan.summary: Japan's government warned the US of 'grave consequences' if it does not provide adequate support for Japan's military, particularly regarding the F-35 fighter jet purchase, on June 28, 2024.

Japan.title: Japan's Prime Minister faces pressure over handling of F-35 scandal
Japan.summary: Japan's Prime Minister faced increasing pressure on June 29, 2024, over his handling of the F-35 scandal, with some opposition parties calling for his resignation.
